description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of concrete and wood panel exterior finishes. The front features a large central window and a covered carport with a visible parked car. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, a pergola, and a rectangular swimming pool, as well as patches of green lawn. A prominent exterior staircase leads from the ground level to the upper floor, providing access to a balcony or terrace area. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large glass panels enhancing natural light. The overall design is sleek and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, wood and concrete finishes, a carport, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central window, and covered carport with a car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, balcony, and part of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, pergola, swimming pool, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the carport, side of the house, backyard pool, and green lawn patches.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, minimal steps, and a covered carport adjacent to the entrance.
